figure_descriptions: Figure 1: Schematic MOST cycle energy diagram
Figure 3: Selected examples of NBDs, AZOs, and DHAs
Figure 4: Energy diagram and phase change MOST molecules
Figure 6: Energy release monitoring by IR spectroscopy
Figure 7: MOST hybrid systems for energy capture

notes: This is a review paper focused on molecular solar thermal (MOST) energy storage systems. No experimental batch/flow comparison data is available as this is not an experimental study. The paper discusses three main photoisomerization systems (NBD/QC, E/Z-AZO, and DHA/VHF) but does not report specific reaction conditions or optimization studies.
